title: galium decipiens var. scabrum
intro: Galium decipiens var. scabrum, also known as rough bedstraw, is a perennial plant belonging to the Galium genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. Galium decipiens var. scabrum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile natural remedy for various ailments.
